name: NEON Squad Tactics
short_description: A turn-based tactics strategy game with a compelling single-player campaign and drop in / drop out multiplayer missions for up to 4 players. Choose from 9 playable Squad members and battle it out across 31 playfields, generated by a holographic table in a cyberpunk bar.
detailed_description:
JOIN THE NEON SQUAD TACTICS COMMUNITY


About the Game

- Turn-based tactics strategy game with a compelling single-player campaign and drop in / drop out multiplayer missions for up to 4 players.

- 31 playfields across 3 diverse biomes.

- Choose from 9 playable Squad members - Floor Model / Assassin / Vanguard / Ravager / Juggernaut / E-Goop / Ghost / Queen / Wildcard

- Over-the-top futuristic weaponry includes laser swords, combat drones, lightning launchers, smart mines, nano-bots, and more.

- Wagering system. The bigger the risks, the bigger the rewards!

- Buy drinks at the bar. Throw them on the battlefield for added buffs.

- Hyper-retro 90s aesthetic and a modern synthwave soundtrack featuring tracks by AM0k, Metasphere, Fynn’s Arcade, Hearts in Beta and Monster Mansion.
